name: Synthetic Construction Partner 15 – CFO Of Contractor With Ten Percent Government Share
activities: Martin Weiss is the Chief Financial Officer of a Frankfurt construction group. The group's revenue mix, per its annual report: about 75% German private commercial projects, 15% German public tenders, and roughly 10% from a single ministry building project in Angola. Mr Weiss holds no shares in the group. His role and the revenue mix are current.
origin_of_assets: Executive salary in the construction industry.
